webview.panel.title: ⚔️ Text Adventure
webview.input.placeholder: Free input (Enter to send to GM)
webview.bgm.autoTitle: GM switches BGM / sound effects automatically
webview.bgm.empty: No bgm.json or no tracks registered
webview.sfx.label: 🔔 SE
webview.summary.label: 📜 Story Summary
webview.summary.placeholder: Story synopsis appears here. You can edit it manually.
webview.saga.suggestBanner: 📚 {count} turns in history (threshold: {threshold}, {tier}). Archive old turns into a saga chapter?
webview.locale.label: 🌐 Language
webview.tts.title: 🔊 Voice Narration
webview.stt.title: 🎤 Voice input
webview.stt.unsupported: Voice input is not supported in this environment
webview.welcome:
⚔️ Welcome to LoreRelay!
Start a game in your AI chat — adventure logs will appear here.
webview.image.failed: ⚠️ Image generation failed. Check that ComfyUI is running.
webview.image.noTurn: No GM turn is available to attach an image.
webview.gm.failed: ⚠️ GM bridge turn failed. Check the output channel.
webview.dice.requestBanner: 🎲 GM is asking you to roll {notation}
webview.dice.requestFallback: 🔔 If you didn't hear a dice sound, please roll manually and press "Send to GM"
webview.dice.requestInvalid: ❓ GM requested a dice roll (unknown format: {notation}). Please roll manually and press "Send to GM"
extension.error.untrustedWorkspace: This action runs local commands and is disabled in untrusted workspaces.
extension.error.gmBusy: GM is still processing the previous turn. Please wait.
extension.error.inputTooLong: Player input is too long (max {max} characters).
extension.warning.authorsNoteTooLong: Warning: Author's Note exceeded the limit (max {max} characters) and was ignored.
extension.error.gmCommandUnset: gmBridge.command is not set. Specify an executable in Settings.
extension.error.scriptNotFound: {script} not found. Place TextAdventureGMSkill/scripts or set gmBridge.scriptPath.
extension.error.imageScriptNotFound: ComfyUI script not found. Check textAdventure.skillPath.
extension.error.scenarioMissing: scenario.json not found in the selected folder.
extension.warning.grokExit: Grok exited with code {code}. Check "Text Adventure: GM Bridge" output.
extension.warning.localExit: {provider} bridge exited with code {code}. Check "Text Adventure: GM Bridge" output.
extension.info.clipboard: Copied "{text}" to clipboard. Paste it into your AI chat.
extension.info.scenarioLoaded: Loaded scenario "{title}"{extra}. Tell your AI to read scenario.json, or enter an action to start.
extension.scenario.resetConfirm: Loading a new scenario pack will reset your current game progress and history. Do you want to proceed?
extension.st.importCharacterDone: SillyTavern character imported and set as active.
extension.st.importCharacterFailed: Failed to import SillyTavern character card.
extension.st.importLorebookTitle: Select SillyTavern world info / lorebook JSON
extension.error.summarizeUnavailable: Context Summarizer is not available for your current GM provider.
extension.error.archiveUnavailable: Saga Archiver is not available for your current GM provider.
extension.error.sagaFailed: Failed to archive saga chapter. Need at least 15 history entries.
extension.info.sagaDone: Saga chapter archived. Old turns moved to sagas/ (verbatim backup kept).
extension.info.archiveSuggest: Adventure log has {count} turns (archive suggested at {threshold}). Archive a chapter?
webview.authorsNote.placeholder: Author's Note (steers next GM turn only)
webview.gameOver.restartHint: Load a scenario pack or edit game_state.json to start a new adventure.
extension.warning.gameOverLocked: The adventure has ended. Start a new game to continue.
extension.warning.rewindNotFound: Could not find that turn in history.
extension.warning.noHistoryToCheckpoint: No adventure history to save as a checkpoint.
extension.warning.noTurnToRegenerate: No previous player action to regenerate from.
extension.warning.imageBusy: Image generation is already running. Please wait.
extension.warning.openRouterLegacyKey: OpenRouter API key is still stored in VS Code settings. Use "Text Adventure: Set OpenRouter API Key" to store it in SecretStorage.
extension.warning.openRouterEmptyKey: OpenRouter API key was empty. Nothing was saved.
extension.error.openRouterKeyMissing: OpenRouter API key is not set. Run "Text Adventure: Set OpenRouter API Key" from the command palette.
extension.openRouter.keyPrompt: Enter your OpenRouter API key. It will be stored in VS Code SecretStorage.
extension.info.openRouterKeySaved: OpenRouter API key saved in SecretStorage.
extension.info.openRouterKeyMigrated: OpenRouter API key has been automatically migrated to SecretStorage and removed from settings.json.
extension.info.openRouterKeyCleared: OpenRouter API key cleared from SecretStorage.
extension.scenario.validateTitle: Select scenario pack folder to validate
extension.scenario.exportTitle: Select scenario pack folder to export
webview.msg.branchConfirm: Rewind history to this turn and branch?
webview.imageGen.title: Image Gen Settings
webview.imageGen.hint: Saved to image_gen_config.json in your workspace. 0 = workflow default.
gm.prompt.regenerate:
[Regenerate] Provide a different GM narrative for the same situation. Player action was: {action}
Keep status consistent unless the new outcome requires changes. Update game_state.json.
gm.prompt.continue:
{base}

As GM, advance one text-adventure turn for the action above and update game_state.json in the workspace root.
